name: swarm-discussion
description: Codex marketplace for the swarm-discussion plugin family. Each host adapter lives in its own repository around the shared swarm-discussion-runtime; this repo only points at certified adapter releases.

plugins.name: swarm-discussion
plugins.description: Codex adapter: a thin parent skill projects run-scoped custom expert agents, starts a dedicated coordinator thread, and lets the vendored runtime own prompt construction, transport capture, projection provenance, validation, and retained artifacts.
